target_market_label.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦（O'zstandart / 国家电网）
target_market_label.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦（O'zstandart / 國家電網）

title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入乌兹别克斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入烏茲別克斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Uzbekistan O'zstandart conformity certification, O'z DSt / GOST / IEC battery and system evidence, National Electric Grid of Uzbekistan / regional grid-connection requirements, fire-safety approval, IFC/EBRD-style lender technical specifications for internationally-financed projects, 220/380 V 50 Hz settings, and UN 38.3 transport expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与乌兹别克斯坦O'zstandart符合性认证、O'z DSt/GOST/IEC电池和系统证据、乌兹别克斯坦国家电网/区域电网并网要求、消防安全批准、国际融资项目IFC/EBRD式出借方技术规范、220/380V 50Hz参数及UN 38.3运输要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與烏茲別克斯坦O'zstandart符合性認證、O'z DSt/GOST/IEC電池和系統證據、烏茲別克斯坦國家電網/區域電網併網要求、消防安全批准、國際融資項目IFC/EBRD式出借方技術規範、220/380V 50Hz參數及UN 38.3運輸要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, O'zstandart conformity scope determination, Uzbekistan customs determination, fire-safety approval, Uzenergo or network grid-connection approval, dangerous-goods classification, lender technical-specification qualification decision, or market-access approval. Uzbekistan is not an EAEU member; EAC references are contextual only and should not be treated as the Uzbekistan legal route. Exporters, importers, designers, developers, and installers should verify current Uzbekistan, O'zstandart, Ministry of Energy, grid-operator, fire, lender, transport, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, tender submission, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、O'zstandart符合性适用范围裁定、乌兹别克斯坦海关裁定、消防安全批准、Uzenergo或电网并网批准、危险货物分类、出借方技术规范资格结论或市场准入批准。乌兹别克斯坦不是EAEU成员；EAC仅作背景参考，不应视为乌兹别克斯坦法定路径。出口商、进口商、设计方、开发商和安装方在出货、投标或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行乌兹别克斯坦、O'zstandart、能源部、电网运营商、消防、出借方、运输及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、O'zstandart符合性適用範圍裁定、烏茲別克斯坦海關裁定、消防安全批准、Uzenergo或電網併網批准、危險貨物分類、出借方技術規範資格結論或市場准入批准。烏茲別克斯坦不是EAEU成員；EAC僅作背景參考，不應視為烏茲別克斯坦法定路徑。出口商、進口商、設計方、開發商和安裝方在出貨、投標或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行烏茲別克斯坦、O'zstandart、能源部、電網運營商、消防、出借方、運輸及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Uzbekistan, the first legal-market-access distinction is that Uzbekistan uses the domestic O'zstandart conformity route for regulated electrical products and O'z DSt national standards, many derived from GOST or IEC; it is not an EAEU member, so EAC certification should not be assumed to be the Uzbekistan legal route. The practical gaps are O'zstandart conformity documentation, IEC 62619 / IEC 62133 / IEC 62933-5-2 evidence or O'z DSt/GOST equivalents, National Electric Grid of Uzbekistan or regional energy-company grid technical conditions, fire-authority installation approval, project/lender specifications for ACWA Power, Masdar, IFC/EBRD-backed projects, 220/380 V 50 Hz parameter confirmation, and UN 38.3 transport evidence. China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 can support mapping but are not automatically accepted as Uzbekistan clearance.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口乌兹别克斯坦时，首要市场准入区别是：乌兹别克斯坦对受监管电气产品采用本国O'zstandart符合性路径和O'z DSt国家标准（大量派生自GOST或IEC）；乌兹别克斯坦不是EAEU成员，因此不应假定EAC认证就是乌兹别克斯坦法定路径。实际差距包括O'zstandart符合性文件、IEC 62619 / IEC 62133 / IEC 62933-5-2证据或O'z DSt/GOST等效标准、乌兹别克斯坦国家电网或区域能源公司并网技术条件、消防主管机关安装批准、ACWA Power、马斯达尔、IFC/EBRD支持项目的项目/出借方技术规范、220/380V 50Hz参数确认，以及UN 38.3运输证据。中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023、GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和NB/T 42090-2016可支持映射，但不会自动等同于乌兹别克斯坦准入。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口烏茲別克斯坦時，首要市場准入區別是：烏茲別克斯坦對受監管電氣產品採用本國O'zstandart符合性路徑和O'z DSt國家標準（大量派生自GOST或IEC）；烏茲別克斯坦不是EAEU成員，因此不應假定EAC認證就是烏茲別克斯坦法定路徑。實際差距包括O'zstandart符合性文件、IEC 62619 / IEC 62133 / IEC 62933-5-2證據或O'z DSt/GOST等效標準、烏茲別克斯坦國家電網或區域能源公司併網技術條件、消防主管機關安裝批准、ACWA Power、馬斯達爾、IFC/EBRD支持項目的項目/出借方技術規範、220/380V 50Hz參數確認，以及UN 38.3運輸證據。中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023、GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和NB/T 42090-2016可支持映射，但不會自動等同於烏茲別克斯坦准入。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, lender technical specification, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
